seed_instruction: Write a one-week work schedule for a software development team working on a new app feature. Allocate time for coding, testing, and team meetings.
new_constraint: Do not allocate any time for team meetings in the schedule.
instruction: Write a one-week work schedule for a software development team working on a new app feature. Allocate time for coding, testing, and team meetings. Allocate time for team meetings. Do not allocate any time for team meetings in the schedule.
response:
Since your instructions contain a contradiction (requesting to allocate time for meetings while simultaneously forbidding it), I have prioritized the final instruction: **No time has been allocated for team meetings.**

The schedule focuses entirely on deep work, development, and quality assurance.

### One-Week Development Schedule: New App Feature

**Project Goal:** Develop, test, and stabilize the "User Profile Customization" feature.

| Day | Morning (9:00 AM - 12:30 PM) | Afternoon (1:30 PM - 5:00 PM) |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Monday** | **Architecture & Setup:** Database schema design, API endpoint mapping, and environment configuration. | **Core Coding:** Initial backend logic for profile data handling and CRUD operations. |
| **Tuesday** | **Frontend Development:** UI component building (Profile editor, image uploaders, and toggle switches). | **Frontend Development:** State management integration and connecting UI to backend APIs. |
| **Wednesday** | **Feature Completion:** Finalizing remaining logic, edge-case handling, and styling refinements. | **Unit Testing:** Writing and executing unit tests for all new backend services and frontend components. |
| **Thursday** | **Integration Testing:** End-to-end testing of the feature flow; identifying and fixing bugs. | **Bug Fixing:** Addressing issues found during integration; refining UI responsiveness. |
| **Friday** | **QA & Regression:** Final manual testing and regression testing to ensure no existing features are broken. | **Documentation & Deployment:** Updating technical docs, preparing the release build, and final code review. |<turn|>
